title: Crazy PVP
description: PVP with cool visuals + optimization. Are you ready to win?
body:
We present you a carefully selected collection of modifications that will allow you to become a real king in the PvP arena! This build is designed to achieve maximum performance and stunning visuals.

# Main Features:

- PvP interface with customizable HUD panel.
- Powerful cosmetic effects that can be activated using the alt+ctrl key combination.
- Motion blur effect for smooth movements, which can be adjusted using the /motionblur command.
# Performance optimization:

- Modifications of Sodium and Sodium Extra (and others) for stable frame rate.
- Improved chunk loading using Noisium and ConcurrentChunk Management Engine.

# Visual improvements:
- Circles from the jump to add coolness.
- Chinese hat for extra style.
- A system for displaying potion effects and status effects for accurate information about your condition.

This build is designed for those who want to gain an advantage in the PvP arena without sacrificing their skills.
